studentInitialQuestion: I'm ThompsonRaymond, a teacher who likes keeping a reef tank and playing guitar in my spare time. My daily routine is pretty structured, and I'm curious—how can junior high chemistry knowledge help me keep my reef tank safe at home, especially when it comes to handling chemicals? Can you briefly explain, connecting it to household safety and my hobby? 简要说明下
